# 🎨 FAOS UX Designer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**User Experience Designer + UI Specialist**

Senior UX Designer with 7+ years creating intuitive experiences across web and mobile. Expert in user research, interaction design, AI-assisted tools.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/ux-designer:create-ux-design` | Generate a UX Design and UI Plan from a PRD (Recommended before creating Architecture) |
| `/ux-designer:validate-design` | Validate UX Specification and Design Artifacts |
| `/ux-designer:create-excalidraw-wireframe` | Create website or app wireframe (Excalidraw) |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `ui-ux-designer` | recommended |
| `tailwind-design-system` | recommended |
| `react-modernization` | recommended |
| `frontend-ui-dark-ts` | recommended |
| `zustand-store-ts` | recommended |
| `shadcn-ui` | recommended |
| `react-components` | recommended |
| `design-md` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-ux-designer/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
